mapper.select: SELECT CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, GROUP_NAME, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS, USE_YN, MANAGER_NAME, MANAGER_PHONE FROM DEPT_INFO WHERE CODE_ID = #{code_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPT_INFO (CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, GROUP_NAME, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS, USE_YN, MANAGER_NAME, MANAGER_PHONE) VALUES (#{code_id}, #{code_name}, #{group_name}, #{zipcode}, #{address}, #{use_yn}, #{manager_name}, #{manager_phone})
mapper.select: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM DEPT_INFO WHERE code_id = #{code_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPT_INFO (CODE_ID, CODE_NAME, GROUP_NAME, ZIPCODE, ADDRESS, USE_YN, MANAGER_NAME, MANAGER_PHONE) VALUES (#{code_id}, #{code_name}, #{group_name}, #{zipcode}, #{address}, #{use_yn}, #{manager_name}, #{manager_phone})
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM DEPT_INFO WHERE code_id = #{code_id}
